advancements.adventure.ol_betsy.descript: Shoot a Tanegashima; an arquebuse smuggled into Japan by the Portuguese in 1543, which quickly became a dominant weapon of war during the Sengoku Era.

advancements.adventure.overoverkill.desc: Deal 50 hearts of damage in a single hit using the Kusanagi no Tsurugi

Throw a Spear at something.
Note: Throwing away your only weapon is not a good idea.
Use a Charm of Undying to cheat death
advancements.adventure.trim_with_all_exc: Apply these smithing templates at least once: Dragon, Oni, Lord, Vengeful, Silence, Tengu, Vassal, Kabuki

advancements.adventure.voluntary_exile.d:
Take a drink from the sake of the Bandit Lord.
Maybe consider staying away from villages for the time being...

You've Got a Friend in Me
advancements.husbandry.axolotl_in_a_buck: Ōsanshōuo, also known as the Japanese Giant Salamander, is a fully aquatic amphibian exclusive to the Japanese Islands. They can be found in river streams and in deep caves where they ambush their prey.
advancements.husbandry.kill_axolotl_targ: Team up with an Ōsanshōuo and win a fight
advancements.husbandry.netherite_hoe.des: Use a Hihi'irokane Ingot to upgrade a Kama, and then reevaluate your life choices

advancements.husbandry.plant_seed.title: A Seedy Place

advancements.nether.ride_strider_in_over: Take a Wa nyūdō for a loooong ride on a lava lake in the Overworld
advancements.nether.root.description: A hollow land of darkness and decay
advancements.nether.root.title: Yomi
advancements.nether.summon_wither.descri: Sick on my journey, my dreams go wandering, over withered fields.
advancements.nether.summon_wither.title: Yokai Encounter: Tatarigami
advancements.nether.uneasy_alliance.desc: Rescue an Ōkubi from Yomi, bring it safely home to the Overworld... and then kill it
Weaken and then cure a Dorotabō
advancements.story.deflect_arrow.descrip: Parry projectiles with your sword, shield, or other weapons.
advancements.story.deflect_arrow.title: Not Today, Thank You
advancements.story.enchant_item.descript: Charm an item at at the Juyosho Altar
advancements.story.enchant_item.title: Charmer
advancements.story.enter_the_end.descrip: After Izanagi escaped the land of the dead, he felt contaminated by the filths of Yomi and washed himself in a river. What came off his body was a pantheon of deities that would change Japan for all of history. One of those deities was Ryūjin, the dragon god of the seas and tide. Ruler of the undersea palace Ryūgū-jō, which you have entered uninvited.
advancements.story.enter_the_end.title: Yokai Encounter: Ryūjin
advancements.story.enter_the_nether.desc: When the creator goddess Izanami gave birth to Kagutsuchi, the kami of fire. Her husband Izanagi, fueled by grief, marched down to retireve her in Yomi; The land of the dead. The place where all who die make home.
advancements.story.follow_ender_eye.desc: Find the sacred gateway to Ryūgū-jō
advancements.story.form_obsidian.descrip: Obtain a block of Obsidian, the same material used by Izanagi to block off the entrance to Yomi upon his escape.
advancements.story.form_obsidian.title: Combining the Inyo
advancements.story.iron_tools.title: Folded Steel
advancements.story.lava_bucket.title: Blood of Kagu-tsuchi
advancements.story.mine_diamond.title: Diamonds!

advancements.story.mine_stone.title: Stone Age
advancements.story.obtain_armor.descript: Protect yourself with a piece of Tamahagane armor
advancements.story.obtain_armor.title: Suit Up

advancements.story.smelt_iron.title: Acquire Hardware

gamerule.doVinesSpread.description: Controls whether or not the Vines block spreads randomly to adjacent blocks. Does not affect other types of vine blocks such as Weeping Vines, Weeping Shoots, etc.
gamerule.enderPearlsVanishOnDeath: Thrown Jade Pearls vanish on death
gamerule.enderPearlsVanishOnDeath.descri: Whether Jade Pearls thrown by a player vanish when that player dies.
gamerule.entitiesWithPassengersCanUsePor: Allow entities with passengers to teleport through Yomi Portals, Ryūgū-jō Portals, and Ryūgū-jō Gateways.
gamerule.playersNetherPortalCreativeDela: Player's Yomi portal delay in creative mode
Time (in ticks) that a creative mode player needs to stand in a Yomi portal before changing dimensions.
gamerule.playersNetherPortalDefaultDelay: Player's Yomi portal delay in non-creative mode
Time (in ticks) that a non-creative mode player needs to stand in a Yomi portal before changing dimensions.
gamerule.tntExplosionDropDecay: In Black-Powder Keg explosions, some blocks won't drop their loot
gamerule.tntExplosionDropDecay.descripti: Some of the drops from blocks destroyed by explosions caused by Black-Powder Keg are lost in the explosion.

selectWorld.gameMode.creative.info: Create, build, and explore without limits. You can fly, have endless materials, and can't be hurt by yōkai.
selectWorld.gameMode.survival.info: Explore a mysterious world where you build, collect, craft, and fight yōkai.
